payload.input: They’ll be so relieved we’re being productive that they’ll leave us alone."  Ethan nods frantically, grabbing his clothes from the floor, pulling his shirt over his head inside out in his haste. "And the money? What if they check our phones?"  "We hide it," Maya says, already moving to strip the bed, yanking the soiled sheets into a ball, her mind racing ahead to the bleach she’ll need for the mattress, the shower they’ll have to take, the evidence they must erase. "We tell Vivian and Julian to come Tuesday at two. We’ll message them from the bathroom, delete the app after we confirm. We’ll redownload it when we’re ready."
